global_description: A small, agile bird with a compact, streamlined body. It features iridescent green upperparts and a rich, rufous-orange underbelly. The wings are narrow and pointed, aiding in rapid flight. The tail is forked and rufous with dark tips, while the head is adorned with a shimmering red throat patch.
discriminative_attributes: Forked rufous tail with dark tips
spatial_relations: The narrow wings extend from the sides of the compact body
The forked tail is positioned at the rear of the body
The red throat patch is located on the front of the head
